notes: No more mystery credit changes. Several recurring flows used to move your balance each cycle while only logging occasionally (or not at all) — colony tax, colony export revenue, organization upkeep, haven tribute, and the UBI / monopoly-grant policies. They now all report into a single '💰 Cycle accounts' line at the end of every cycle that itemizes each source and the net, so every credit move is explained. (Trade-network, decree, logistics, mandate and commission income already logged their own lines.)
